info.name: Universal WhatsApp Bot Admin API
info.description: Complete admin API collection for managing multi-purpose WhatsApp bot projects, authentication, and dynamic prompts. Works for any industry: healthcare, restaurants, customer service, e-commerce, etc.

request.description: Login with admin credentials to get JWT bearer token. Default credentials provided at setup time.
Get current admin user profile information
Get details of a specific project

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Pizza Palace Restaurant",
  "slug": "pizza-palace",
  "botName": "PizzaBot",
  "description": "WhatsApp bot for Pizza Palace - table reservations, menu orders, delivery tracking",
  "systemPrompt": "You are a friendly restaurant assistant for Pizza Palace. Help customers make reservations, order food, and track deliveries. Only recommend items from the menu.",
  "welcomeMessage": "Welcome to *Pizza Palace*! 🍕 I can help with menu, reservations, and deliveries. What can I do for you?",
  "isEnabled": false
}

## OTHER EXAMPLES:

# Example 2: Healthcare System
{
  "name": "City Hospital Network",
  "slug": "city-hospital",
  "botName": "HealthBot",
  "description": "Doctor appointments, medicines, health FAQs",
  "systemPrompt": "You are a healthcare assistant for City Hospital. Help with symptoms, appointments, and prescriptions.",
  "welcomeMessage": "Welcome to City Hospital! I can help with appointments and health information."
}

# Example 3: E-Commerce
{
  "name": "TechShop Store",
  "slug": "techshop",
  "botName": "ShopBot",
  "description": "Product catalog, order tracking, support",
  "systemPrompt": "You are TechShop assistant. Help customers find products, placing orders, and tracking shipments.",
  "welcomeMessage": "Welcome to TechShop! Browse products, track orders, and get support."
}

request.description: Create a new project for ANY use case (restaurants, healthcare, e-commerce, customer support, etc.)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Apollo Hospitals Delhi - Updated",
  "botName": "Apollo Health Assistant",
  "description": "Updated healthcare bot for Apollo Hospitals",
  "systemPrompt": "You are Apollo Health Assistant. Follow all safety protocols.",
  "welcomeMessage": "Welcome to Apollo Health! How can I assist you today?"
}

request.description: Enable a project (only one project can be enabled at a time - previous enabled project will be disabled)
Get system prompt, user prompt template, and response schema for a project
Update system prompt, user prompt template, and/or response schema for a project. All placeholders in templates will be replaced at runtime with actual values.

    {
      "id": "faq-002",

      "category": "BOOKING",

      "category": "MEDICINE",
      "isActive": true
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Import project data (clinics, doctors, medicines, FAQs) with non-destructive merge (default). When replaceExisting is true, existing data will be deleted first.
Import project data with replaceExisting=true to delete all existing data first (destructive update). Useful for complete data refresh.
